name: pi-agent-loop
description_en: General-purpose agent loop extension for pi. Supports goal loops (repeat until done), fixed-pass loops, and multi-stage pipelines via /loop goal, /loop passes, and /loop pipeline commands.
description_zh: pi 的通用代理循环扩展。通过 /loop goal、/loop passes 和 /loop pipeline 命令支持目标循环（重复直到完成）、固定通道循环和多阶段管道。
